rows.CNzh: 冰、冰块……
rows.TWzh: 冰、冰塊……
rows.JPja: こ <Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷が…
rows.USen: Th-the ice...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>海利亚人，你来干什么？

这里是保管天然冰的<Color=red>冰屋<Color=white>，
材料来自格鲁德高地的融雪之水。
这可不是你能随便参观的地方。

<unk[3:0:10]>……虽说如此，由于这一带气温上升，
<Color=red>冰<Color=white>全都融化掉了。
已经不算是一间<Color=red>冰屋<Color=white>了……<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:12]>酒吧里用这儿的天然冰制成的特色鸡尾酒
在小镇居民和游客之间都备受欢迎……
要是一直没有冰可送，
总有一天会喝不到鸡尾酒的……<unk[5:0]>
<unk[3:0:268]>在那之前，
必须得想办法制造出<Color=red>冰<Color=white>才行……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>海利亞人，怎麼了嗎？

這裡是保管天然冰塊的<Color=red>冰屋<Color=white>，
冰塊都是由格魯德高地的融雪之水製成。
可不是你能以觀光心態隨意接近的地方。

<unk[3:0:10]>……話雖如此，由於這一帶氣溫上升，
害<Color=red>冰塊<Color=white>全都融化……
這裡已經稱不上是<Color=red>冰屋<Color=white>了……<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:12]>雖然酒吧使用這裡的天然冰塊調製的名產雞尾酒
很受小鎮居民和觀光客喜愛……
但要是無法送出冰塊的情況繼續下去，
我想喝不到雞尾酒只是遲早的事吧……<unk[5:0]>
<unk[3:0:268]>得在事態演變成那樣前，
想辦法製作<Color=red>冰塊<Color=white>才行……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>なんだ ハイリア<Ruby={2:4}じん>人

ここは ゲルド<Ruby={4:6}こうち>高地の<Ruby={4:6}ゆきど>雪解け<Ruby={2:4}みず>水から<Ruby={2:4}つく>作った
<Ruby={6:14}てんねんごおり>天然氷を<Ruby={4:6}ほかん>保管している <Color=red><Ruby={4:6}ひむろ>氷室<Color=white>だ
<Ruby={8:14}かんこうきぶん>観光気分で <Ruby={2:2}た>立ち<Ruby={2:2}よ>寄るところではないぞ

<unk[3:0:10]>…と<Ruby={2:2}い>言っても この<Ruby={4:8}いったい>一帯の<Ruby={4:6}きおん>気温が<Ruby={2:2}あ>上がったせいで
<Color=red><Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷<Color=white>は すべて<Ruby={2:2}と>溶けてしまってな
もはや<Color=red> <Ruby={4:6}ひむろ>氷室<Color=white>とはいえんが…

<unk[3:0:12]>ここの<Ruby={6:14}てんねんごおり>天然氷を<Ruby={2:4}つか>使った バーの<Ruby={4:8}めいぶつ>名物カクテルは
<Ruby={2:4}まち>街の<Ruby={2:4}もの>者や<Ruby={6:14}かんこうきゃく>観光客に <Ruby={6:10}だいにんき>大人気なのだが…
このまま<Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷を<Ruby={2:4}とど>届けられなければ
いずれ <Ruby={2:2}の>飲めなくなってしまうだろう…
<unk[3:0:268]>そうなる<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前に
どうにかして<Color=red> <Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}つく>作らないと…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>Oh. You're a Hylian...


Vasaaq. This is the <Color=red>icehouse<Color=white>. It's where
we store ice...<unk[5:0]>obviously. It's all made from
snowmelt from the Gerudo Highlands.
I'm kind of surprised to see you here.
It isn't really a tourist destination.

<unk[3:0:10]>But you're probably wondering where all
the ice is, right? Well, it's gotten hot
enough that it all melted.
Feels wrong to even call the place an
<Color=red>icehouse<Color=white> right now...

<unk[3:0:12]>Have you heard about the incredibly
popular drink the Noble Canteen in town
makes? Well, it uses ice from here.
Or it did. If I can't get ice delivered to
town, there won't be any signature drinks
being made by anyone.
<unk[3:0:268]>I've got to find a way to make ice...

rows.CNzh: 融化了……

rows.USen: Water again...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>现在因为<Color=red>沙尘<Color=white>肆虐，甚至都收不到冰的订单了，
不知道算幸运还是不幸……
但再这么下去，
镇上的人们一定会伤心的。
<Color=grey><Size=80>酒吧里用这儿的冰制成的鸡尾酒
是唯一要保证不能断货的！不然可就喝不到了！<Size=100><Color=white>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>不知是幸還是不幸，由於<Color=red>沙塵<Color=white>的緣故，
我們現在也接不到冰塊訂單……
再這樣下去，
鎮上的大家肯定會很難過的。
<Color=grey><Size=80>喝不到酒吧使用這邊的冰塊調製的雞尾酒，
唯獨這種情況絕不能讓它發生！<Size=100><Color=white>
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]><Ruby={2:4}こう>幸か<Ruby={4:6}ふこう>不幸か <Ruby={2:4}いま>今は<Color=red><Ruby={4:6}さじん>砂塵<Color=white>のせいで
<Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷の<Ruby={4:10}ちゅうもん>注文も <Ruby={2:4}はい>入ってこないが…
このままじゃ
<Ruby={2:4}まち>街のみんなが<Ruby={2:4}かな>悲しむことは <Ruby={4:6}まちが>間違いない
<Color=grey><Size=80>ここの<Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷を<Ruby={2:4}つか>使った バーのカクテルが<Ruby={2:2}の>飲めなくなるなんて<unk[5:0]>
それだけは <Ruby={4:8}ぜったい>絶対に<Ruby={4:4}そし>阻止せねばならん！<Size=100><Color=white>
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>I haven't gotten any orders for ice lately,
no doubt due to this strange <Color=red>sand shroud<Color=white>
that won't seem to go away...
So if I don't have any ice to deliver when
the orders finally come, everyone back
home will be really disappointed...
<Color=grey><Size=80>I simply cannot allow anything to come between
Gerudo Town and that wonderful, icy, popular drink
at the canteen.<Size=100><Color=white>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>非常<Color=red>寒冷<Color=white>的夜里，
水面偶尔会结一层薄薄的冰……
但一到早上就会化掉……<unk[5:0]>
真的没有能制<Color=red>冰<Color=white>的办法吗……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>在非常<Color=red>寒冷<Color=white>的夜晚，
水面有時會結成一層薄薄的冰……

<unk[3:0:12]>すごく<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}さむ>寒い<Color=white><Ruby={2:2}ひ>日の<Ruby={2:4}よる>夜は

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>You know, on the really, really <Color=red>cold<Color=white>
nights, I sometimes see a thin layer of ice
forming on the surface of the water.
It's always melted by the time morning
comes though. There must be some way
to get <Color=red>ice <Color=white>in here...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>噢噢！<unk[5:0]>这不是冰吗！

原来海利亚人会制冰吗！？<unk[5:0]>
我一直待在冰屋和雪山，根本不知道呢！
如果可以的话，
能请你把那冰让给我吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>哦！<unk[5:0]>這不是冰塊嗎！

難不成海利亞人會製作冰塊嗎！？<unk[5:0]>
因為我老是待在冰屋跟雪山，完全不知道這回事啊！
如果你不介意的話，
能不能把那冰塊讓給我呢？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]>おぉ！<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷じゃないか！

ハイリア<Ruby={2:4}じん>人は <Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷を<Ruby={2:4}つく>作れるのか！？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:6}ひむろ>氷室や<Ruby={4:8}ゆきやま>雪山に<Ruby={2:4}こも>籠ってばかりで <Ruby={2:2}し>知らなかったよ！
お<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前さえ<Ruby={2:2}よ>良ければ この<Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷
<Ruby={2:4}ゆず>譲ってもらえないだろうか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>Hey! That's ice, isn't it?


I didn't know Hylians could make ice!
Maybe I've been in the icehouse—or up
on the mountain—for too long...
Anyway, if it's OK with you, could I have
this ice?

rows.CNzh:
如果你能<Color=red>调整一下宽度<Color=white>，
制一块尺寸刚好能放入架子的冰，
那就帮了大忙了……
rows.TWzh:
要是你能幫我把冰塊的<Color=red>寬度調整<Color=white>成
剛好能放到架上，
然後再放上去，會非常有幫助……

fits nicely in that alcove, that would
be ideal.

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>Hey! That's ice, isn't it? I didn't know
Hylians could make ice!

<unk[3:0:263]>This is the <Color=red>icehouse<Color=white>. It's where we store
ice...<unk[5:0]>obviously. It's all made from
snowmelt from the Gerudo Highlands.
But you're probably wondering where all
the ice is, right? Well, it's gotten hot
enough that it all melted.
<unk[3:0:12]>Maybe you've heard about the super-
popular drink the Noble Canteen makes
in town? It uses ice from here.
Or it did. If I can't get ice delivered to
town, there won't be any signature drinks
being made by anyone.
<unk[3:0:263]>That's all a long way of me asking you...
Can I have this ice?

rows.CNzh: 又化成水了……
rows.TWzh: 又融成水了……
rows.JPja: また水だけに…
rows.USen: Just a bunch of water...

rows.CNzh: 冰的大小……
rows.TWzh: 冰塊的體積……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:6}こおり>氷の<Ruby={2:4}おお>大きさが…
rows.USen: Ice...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>沙漠气温升高，导致冰都融化了，
我正在愁该怎么办呢……
不过，海利亚人应该会制冰吧！

when I can't repay you, so give me some
time, OK?
You could always visit the spa in Gerudo
Town in the mean—

Oh, wait.<unk[5:1]> You're a voe, so you aren't
